parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { run_mode: 'scheduled' } }];

nodes.name: Sheets - Leer Contratos
nodes.notes: Fuente ?nica de contratos. Se esperan columnas: Contrato_ID, Status_Contrato, Fecha_Fin (YYYY-MM-DD), Ad_ID, Ad_Name, Regex_Anuncio, Notificado_Previo.

nodes.name: Emitir Alerta Operativa
nodes.notes: Canal ?nico de alertas en MVP (sin fallback Slack/Telegram).

nodes.name: Meta_Check_Precheck_Estado_Ad
nodes.notes: Pre-check: continuar solo si Meta devuelve ACTIVE y nombre matchea regex case-insensitive.

nodes.name: Pause_Meta_Pausar_Ad
nodes.notes: Kill-switch: pausa SOLO a nivel Ad.

nodes.name: Sheets - Marcar Finalizado
nodes.notes:
Regla de dominio: solo pasar a Finalizado si la pausa en Meta fue exitosa.
Retry anti-quota: 6 intentos, espera 10s

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: =Contrato {{$json.Contrato_ID}} vencido no elegible para pausa: regex no matchea nombre de anuncio en Sheet.

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: =Contrato {{$json.Contrato_ID}} vencido sin pausa: precheck Meta fall? tras {{$json.precheck_max_attempts}} intentos (?ltimo status {{$json.precheck_status_code}}).

assignments.name: alert_type
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const attempt = Number($json.pause_attempt ?? 0); const maxAttempts = Number($json.pause_max_attempts ?? 0); const status = Number($json.pause_status_code ?? $json.http_status ?? 0); const retryable = [429, 500].includes(status) || String($json.pause_reason || "").toLowerCase() === "retry_exhausted"; if (retryable && maxAttempts > 0 && attempt >= maxAttempts) return "EXPIRED_NOT_PAUSED_RETRY_EXHAUSTED"; if (!retryable && (maxAttempts === 0 || attempt < maxAttempts)) return "EXPIRED_NOT_PAUSED_NON_RETRYABLE"; return $json.alert_type || (retryable ? "EXPIRED_NOT_PAUSED_RETRY_EXHAUSTED" : "EXPIRED_NOT_PAUSED_NON_RETRYABLE"); })() }}

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const status = Number($json.pause_status_code ?? $json.http_status ?? 0); const contrato = $json.Contrato_ID || "N/A"; const attempt = Number($json.pause_attempt ?? 0); const maxAttempts = Number($json.pause_max_attempts ?? 0); const retryable = [429, 500].includes(status) || String($json.pause_reason || "").toLowerCase() === "retry_exhausted"; const resolvedType = (retryable && maxAttempts > 0 && attempt >= maxAttempts) ? "EXPIRED_NOT_PAUSED_RETRY_EXHAUSTED" : "EXPIRED_NOT_PAUSED_NON_RETRYABLE"; if (resolvedType === "EXPIRED_NOT_PAUSED_RETRY_EXHAUSTED") return `Contrato ${contrato} vencido sin pausa: se agotaron retries (${maxAttempts}x cada 5m) (status ${status}).`; return `Contrato ${contrato} vencido sin pausa: Meta devolvio una respuesta no reintentable (status ${status}, intento ${attempt}/${maxAttempts || "?"}).`; })() }}

parameters.errorMessage: ={{ (() => { const current = $json || {}; let fromPause = {}; try { fromPause = $item(0).$node["Alerta Cr?tica - Pausa fallida"].json || {}; } catch (e) {} const data = Object.keys(current).length ? current : fromPause; const contrato = data.Contrato_ID || "N/A"; const ad = data.Ad_ID || "N/A"; const type = data.alert_type || "N/A"; return `AdsKiller CRITICAL: anuncio vencido no pausado. Contrato ${contrato}, Ad ${ad}, tipo ${type}`; })() }}

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: =Contrato {{$json.Contrato_ID}} entra en ventana preventiva de 48h para anuncio {{$json.Ad_ID}}.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $json ?? {};
return [{ json: { event: 'internal_chain_dispatch_ok', source_workflow: 'contract-guard-daily-killswitch', target_workflow_id: 'BFHHQwYFfmcpqshb', correlation_id: String(input.correlation_id ?? ''), logical_execution_id: String(input.logical_execution_id ?? ''), status: 'dispatched', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];

const input = $json ?? {};
return [{ json: { event: 'internal_chain_dispatch_error', source_workflow: 'contract-guard-daily-killswitch', target_workflow_id: 'BFHHQwYFfmcpqshb', correlation_id: String(input.correlation_id ?? ''), logical_execution_id: String(input.logical_execution_id ?? ''), status: 'error', error: String(input.error?.message ?? input.message ?? 'unknown_execute_workflow_error'), timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
return [{ json: { run_mode: 'scheduled' } }];
